description_long: This is a large, cylindrical horizontal storage tank mounted on a set of metal rail wheels and tracks, commonly used for transporting or storing industrial liquids such as chemicals or fuel. The tank is painted orange with visible weathering, rust, and black stains, indicating prolonged outdoor use and exposure to harsh conditions. White stenciled markings and warning labels are present on the sides, providing identification and safety information. The tank is supported by two sets of heavy-duty bogies, each with multiple wheels, and features a metal walkway and access hatches on the top. The structure is primarily composed of metal, with reinforced end caps and welded seams for durability and containment. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and safety for hazardous material storage and transport.
description: A weathered orange cylindrical storage tank on rail wheels, featuring safety markings, metal walkways, and heavy-duty support bogies. The tank shows signs of rust and industrial use, with visible hatches and stenciled warnings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular end of the tank, rail wheels, and the symmetry of the cylindrical body.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tank, orange paint, rust patches, stenciled warnings, and the metal walkway on top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the end cap, rail wheels, and the tank's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional stenciled markings, rust, and the full structure of the tank and rail undercarriage.
